name: Old-Fashioned Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup peanut butter, chunky or smooth
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the first four ingredients together and set aside.
2. In a large bowl with a mixer on medium speed, beat the margarine and peanut butter until smooth.
3. Beat in the sugars until blended, then add the eggs and vanilla.
4. Add the flour mixture; beat until well combined.
5. If necessary, chill the dough.
6. Shape into 1-inch balls. Place them about 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Flatten slightly and decorate with candied cherries or flatten with a fork dipped in colored sugars.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. Remove from the cookie sheets and cool on a rack.
Makes 6 dozen.
